content: SocialMini is live! Built with Express.js + vanilla JS. No frameworks, no build step, just clean code. Sometimes simple is best 🏗
If you're studying ML, please learn the linear algebra first. Matrices aren't scary — they're just a way to think about transformations in space.
Just deployed my first solo project to production. Three weeks of evenings and weekends. That first 200 OK in prod hits different 🚀
Hot take: The best code is the code you delete. Every line you write is a liability. Solve the problem with the least possible surface area.
Prize bond results are in! Checking my numbers now... 🤞 Anyone else collect prize bonds? Old school but I find them fun.
React tip: Stop using useEffect for derived state. Just compute it during render. Your code will be cleaner and you'll avoid a whole class of bugs 🪲
Reading about transformer architectures again. Self-attention is genuinely one of the most elegant ideas in modern ML. The math is beautiful. 📊
Tip of the day: In Express.js, always use try/catch inside async route handlers and pass errors to next(err) for centralized error handling. 🛠
Working on a new design system for SocialMini. Dark mode, clean typography, consistent spacing. Design is about solving problems elegantly ✨
Just finished my AI assignment using BFS and DFS search algorithms. Mind-blowing how elegant graph traversal can be! 🧠 #AI #CS
